prompt: Convert SQL port scan detection query to KQL for Sentinel

assertions.text: Output includes standard .kql comment header block
Uses KQL pipe-based flow, not nested SQL-style subqueries
Targets appropriate Sentinel table (CommonSecurityLog, AzureDiagnostics, or AzureNetworkAnalytics)
Uses dcount() for COUNT(DISTINCT dst_port) translation
Uses top N or take N instead of SQL LIMIT
Description notes this was translated from SQL
